title: apium thorei
intro: Apium thorei, also known as Thore's celery, is a plant species within the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Apium thorei include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. Apium thorei can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
